name: PXN VD6 WAS Bundle Racing Wheel
notes: Composite USB device. Native joystick interface is a vendor-defined raw I/O channel (62 bytes in / 62 bytes out on Report ID 1, USAGE_PAGE 0xFF00) — firmware ships no HID-compliant joystick descriptor. Windows treats the wheel as a steering wheel only when an OEMData registry override is in place (community workaround documented at https://www.reddit.com/r/snowrunner/comments/1bgwa55/). Auxiliary HID interfaces on the composite USB device: standard 15-button mouse and standard HID keyboard. Submitted via issue #14.
